summary: Finance Module Enhanced Features - All tests passed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Verified 9 payment types, B2B fields (GST/TDS), modern payslip design with company logo, and payment proofs upload UI.
passed_tests: Backend: Finance Manager India login (200)
Backend: All 9 payment types supported (salary, mechanic_payout, incentive, vendor, admin_expense, operational, statutory, legal, other)
Backend: Vendor Payment B2B fields (actual_amount, gst_percentage, gst_amount, tds_percentage, tds_amount, vendor_name, invoice_number)
Backend: Statutory Payment B2B fields working
Backend: Legal Payment B2B fields working
Backend: B2B payment requires vendor_name (400 error without it)
Backend: Admin Expense payment (non-B2B) with gross_amount, deductions, net_amount
Backend: Operational Expense payment working
Backend: Incentive Payment working
Backend: Other Payment type working
Backend: B2B Payslip shows vendor details (vendor_name, actual_amount, gst_percentage, tds_percentage)
Backend: Non-B2B Payslip shows employee details
Backend: Payment proofs endpoint working
Backend: Filter payments by payment_type working
Backend: CEO can see all payment types
Backend: CEO can approve B2B payments
Frontend: All 9 payment types visible in Create Payment form
Frontend: Vendor Payment form shows B2B fields (Vendor/Payee Name, Invoice Number, Actual Amount, GST %, GST Amount, TDS %, TDS Deducted, Final Payout)
Frontend: Salary Payout form shows non-B2B fields (Employee, Amount Payable, Deductions, Final Payout)
Frontend: B2B form hides Employee dropdown and shows Vendor fields
Frontend: Non-B2B form hides Vendor fields and shows Employee dropdown
Frontend: Payslip modal has modern design with WiseDrive logo
Frontend: Payslip shows Final Payout Amount prominently
Frontend: Payslip has Download PDF button
Frontend: Payslip footer shows '©WiseDrive Technologies Private Limited'
Frontend: Payment Proofs modal shows upload area for JPG, PNG, PDF
seed_data_creation: Test payments created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance Module Enhanced Features fully tested. Key features verified: 1) All 9 payment types (Salary, Mechanic, Incentive, Vendor, Admin Expenses, Operational, Statutory, Legal, Other), 2) B2B payments (Vendor, Statutory, Legal) have GST/TDS fields with auto-calculation, 3) Non-B2B payments have Amount Payable/Deductions/Final Payout fields, 4) Modern payslip design with WiseDrive logo and footer, 5) Payment proofs upload UI supports JPG, PNG, PDF up to 5MB.

features_verified.9 Payment Types: All types visible and functional: Salary Payout, Mechanic Payment, Incentive Payment, Vendor Payment, Admin Expenses, Operational Expenses, Statutory Payments, Legal Payments, Other Payments
features_verified.B2B Payment Fields: Vendor/Statutory/Legal payments show: Actual Amount, GST %, GST Amount, TDS %, TDS Deducted, Final Payout, Vendor/Payee Name, Invoice Number
features_verified.Non-B2B Payment Fields: Salary/Mechanic/Incentive/Admin/Operational/Other payments show: Employee dropdown, Amount Payable, Deductions, Final Payout
features_verified.Modern Payslip Design: Blue gradient header with WiseDrive logo, employee/vendor details, amount breakdown, Final Payout Amount prominently displayed, Download PDF button
features_verified.Payment Proofs Upload: Modal with upload area supporting JPG, PNG, PDF up to 5MB
